text:
## Business Units  
### 1. Retail Banking (Head: Director of Retail Banking)  
**Mission:** Deliver consumer banking products and services  
**Key Functions:**
- Product Management (see [[products]])
- Account Services
- Customer Service (see [[departments]])
- Sales & Onboarding
- Branch Operations (see [[branches]])  
**Key Metrics:**
- Customer acquisition: 50 per quarter
- Account activation rate: 92%
- Net Promoter Score (NPS): 68
- Customer retention: 94%  
**Primary Products:**
- SmartSaver Account (see [[business_ontology]])
- Current Accounts
- Mortgages
- Debit Cards  
---
name: Chunk 7/24

raw_entities.name: Retail Banking
raw_entities.description: A core business unit responsible for delivering consumer banking products and services, overseeing product management, account services, customer service, sales & onboarding, and branch operations to meet retail market demands.
context: ### 1. Retail Banking (Head: Director of Retail Banking)
**Mission:** Deliver consumer banking products and services

raw_entities.name: Director of Retail Banking
raw_entities.description: The named leadership role responsible for heading the Retail Banking business unit, providing strategic oversight and accountability for its mission delivery and key operational functions.
context: ### 1. Retail Banking (Head: Director of Retail Banking)

raw_entities.name: Product Management
raw_entities.description: A functional department within the Retail Banking unit tasked with managing the lifecycle, strategy, governance, and development of banking products.

raw_entities.name: Account Services
raw_entities.description: A dedicated department handling account-related operations, maintenance, support, and lifecycle management for retail customers.

raw_entities.name: Customer Service
raw_entities.description: A specialized department focused on addressing customer inquiries, resolving service issues, and maintaining service quality within the Retail Banking unit.

raw_entities.name: Sales & Onboarding
raw_entities.description: A cross-functional team responsible for acquiring new customers and managing their initial account setup, documentation, and integration processes.

raw_entities.name: Branch Operations
raw_entities.description: An operational office managing physical branch locations, ensuring day-to-day retail banking activities, staffing, and facility standards align with business unit objectives.

raw_entities.name: Customer acquisition
raw_entities.description: A quantitative performance target measuring the rate of new customer intake, established at a threshold of 50 per quarter.

raw_entities.name: Account activation rate
raw_entities.description: A key performance indicator tracking the percentage of newly opened accounts successfully activated, set at a target of 92%.

raw_entities.name: Net Promoter Score (NPS)
raw_entities.description: A customer loyalty metric measuring satisfaction and advocacy potential, with a defined target value of 68.

raw_entities.name: Customer retention
raw_entities.description: A quantitative performance indicator measuring the percentage of customers maintained over a given period, set at a target of 94%.

raw_entities.name: SmartSaver Account
raw_entities.description: A specific consumer banking product offered by the Retail Banking unit, categorized under the bank's business ontology framework for savings and deposit management.

raw_entities.name: Current Accounts
raw_entities.description: A standard transactional account product designed for everyday retail customer spending, cash management, and payment processing.

raw_entities.name: Mortgages
raw_entities.description: A secured lending product offering long-term financing to consumers, typically backed by property collateral and governed by specific underwriting rules.

raw_entities.name: Debit Cards
raw_entities.description: A payment card product linked directly to a customer's deposit account, enabling direct point-of-sale and ATM transactions without credit extension.
